title: polypodium rachisorum
intro: Polypodium rachisorum, also known as the Indian fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Polypodium rachisorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for herbal remedies, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
